records.ety: [L. fugax, fugacis, from fugere: cf. F. fugace. See Fugitive.]

defs: Flying, or disposed to fly; fleeing away; lasting but a short time; volatile.
quotes: Much of its possessions is so hid, so fugacious, and of so uncertain purchase.

defs: Fleeting; lasting but a short time; -- applied particularly to organs or parts which are short-lived as compared with the life of the individual.
